case_title: CAROLYN ANDREWS DORAN VS. GREEN SHEDS LLC

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-07-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-17-2019 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG. PLAINTIFF CAROLYN ANDREW'S DORAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT GREEN SHEDS LLC IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF STIPULATED TO JUDGE PRO TEM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-07-2019 - JUDGMENT.

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-23-2019, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GREEN SHEDS LLC
